span.p: F4 Edit: cut, arrange, add intro/outro music (C2 Audacity)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: F4b Clean audio: high-pass, FFT denoise, de-click, de-ess, compress (C4b)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: F4c Segment + select: split into tagged segments, keep chosen parts (C5b)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: F5 Master: loudness normalise toward -16 LUFS (C4 FFmpeg)

span.p: F8 Package: show notes, chapters, CTA, cover art 1400x1400 (C6 Canva)
